name: Faux Leather Folio Bin with Metal Handles Ivory - Threshold™: Decorative Storage Basket, Rectangle, Spot Clean
description:
Keep it simply elegant when organizing your space with the Faux-Leather Folio Bin with Metal Handles from Threshold™. Made from faux leather, this ivory folio bin exudes chic, modern style and has lower sides that work well for storing books, photo albums and more. The rectangular shape with an open top makes it easy to access the contents, and it comes with built-in metal handles for easy lifting and moving around your home.

Top Width: 12.5in
Bottom Width: 12in
Interior Height: 5.875in
Interior Width: Top 12.25in, Bottom 11.5in
Interior Length: Top 17in, Bottom 16.5in

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
